chunks.text: Technical Reports - Eric Paulos. The Beauty and Joy of Physical Computing (EECS-2022-156) Deanna Gelosi. Turn-by-WiAR: A Computationally-Mediated Approach to Rapid Prototyping of Physical Objects (EECS-2019-70) Vedant Saran and Eric Paulos.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the first two technical reports listed?
chunks.answer: The Beauty and Joy of Physical Computing by Deanna Gelosi and Turn-by-WiAR by Vedant Saran and Eric Paulos.

chunks.text: Programmable Materials (Skintillates) - Final Report (EECS-2016-120) Saurabh Mitra, Yuhao Liu and Yi Tong. Programmable Materials Final Report (EECS-2016-74) Yuhao Liu, Yi Tong, Saurabh Mitra and Eric Paulos.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the two Programmable Materials reports?
chunks.answer: Programmable Materials (Skintillates) by Saurabh Mitra, Yuhao Liu, Yi Tong and Programmable Materials by Yuhao Liu, Yi Tong, Saurabh Mitra, Eric Paulos.

chunks.text: Towards Digital Apprenticeship: Wearable Activity Recognition in the Workshop Setting (EECS-2015-172) Timothy Campbell, Jonathan Harper, Björn Hartmann and Eric Paulos. On-line Collision Avoidance for Multiple Robots Using B-Splines (CSD-98-977) Eric Paulos.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the last two technical reports?
chunks.answer: Towards Digital Apprenticeship by Timothy Campbell, Jonathan Harper, Björn Hartmann, Eric Paulos and On-line Collision Avoidance for Multiple Robots Using B-Splines by Eric Paulos.
